title: Crispy Brazilian Oat Bread Crumbs
description: A unique twist on traditional bread crumbs, made with Brazilian flair and crunchy texture.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together oats, crumbled Brazilian bread, and flaky bread.
Sprinkle salt over the mixture and stir to combine.
Spread the mixture onto a baking sheet in an even layer.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until crispy and golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool completely.
Use as a crunchy topping for Chinese dishes like stir-fries or braises.
